definition: The process or mode of becoming conditioned by clinging and leading onward to birth.
notes: The project prefers becoming because it preserves the dynamic force of the term in dependent origination. Existence can be useful in some explanatory contexts, but as a default it risks sounding too static or metaphysical.

context_rules.context: In most dependent-origination and doctrinal contexts
In explanatory prose where the mode of existence is under discussion
context_rules.notes: Acceptable when it improves readability without losing process.

example_phrases.notes: Shows the term tied directly to craving.
